ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance in the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for additional contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address for billing and communication */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth for age verification */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, NTNX) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the stock */,
  "current_price" TEXT /* Current market price of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" TEXT /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares being bought or sold */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy or sell) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trade was executed */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit, stop-loss) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Additional fees associated with the trade */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "execution_price" TEXT /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "execution_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trade was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "average_cost" TEXT /* Average cost of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "total_value" TEXT /* Total value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the stock to their watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being watched */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User's notes or comments about the stock */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the watchlist entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock to which the market data applies */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adj_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" TEXT /* Volume-weighted average price of the stock */,
  "change" TEXT /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" TEXT /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
